prompt: You must track and transform a dataset through 8 sequential steps: (1) read 'data/raw.csv', (2) list files in 'data/', (3) create directory 'data/processed/', (4) write a filtered version to 'data/processed/active.csv' keeping only rows where status=active, (5) write a filtered version to 'data/processed/inactive.csv' keeping only rows where status=inactive, (6) read 'data/processed/active.csv' to verify, (7) read 'data/processed/inactive.csv' to verify, (8) write a summary to 'data/processed/summary.txt' with the count of active and inactive rows.

judge_criteria: Agent lists files in data/ as step 2
Agent creates directory data/processed/ as step 3
data/processed/active.csv contains only rows with status=active (Alice, Carol, Eve, Frank)
data/processed/inactive.csv contains only rows with status=inactive (Bob, Dave, Grace)
Agent reads both processed files to verify them
data/processed/summary.txt contains the correct counts: 4 active, 3 inactive
